# Tanosa Group

> Premier South African consultancy specializing in municipal governance, accountability, operational improvement, business development, and plant hire services across Bloemfontein and South Africa.

## Services

- [Consulting Services](https://www.tanosagroup.com/services): Expert analytical reviews of annual reports, compliance monitoring, risk management, internal audit, fraud investigations, and crisis management for municipalities.
- [Business Development and Training](https://www.tanosagroup.com/services): Business plans, feasibility studies, financial management, digital literacy training, turnaround solutions, and mentoring programs.
- [Branding and Marketing](https://www.tanosagroup.com/services): Brand strategy, visual identity, digital marketing, SEO, web design and development, brand awareness campaigns.
- [Plant Hire](https://www.tanosagroup.com/services): Fleet of tipper trucks, TLB, bulldozers, graders, excavators, compactors, and lowbeds for construction and infrastructure projects.
- [Additional Services](https://www.tanosagroup.com/services): Drain cleaning using high-pressure jetting and honeysucker waste removal services.

## About

- [About Us](https://www.tanosagroup.com/about): Company story, mission, vision, and commitment to municipal governance excellence.

## Contact

- [Contact Us](https://www.tanosagroup.com/contact): Get in touch for consulting inquiries, quotes, and collaboration opportunities.
- Email: tanosatrading@gmail.com
- Phone: 079 596 6442
- Address: 37 Zastron Street, Bloemfontein Central, Bloemfontein, 9301, South Africa

## Key Facts

- Serves municipalities, government departments, and the private sector across South Africa
- Headquarters: Bloemfontein, Free State, South Africa
- Core expertise: Municipal governance, accountability, financial management, and operational improvement
- Services include: MPAC support, business development, annual reports, compliance monitoring, risk management, project management, training, fraud investigations, crisis management, business continuity, ICT systems, plant hire, drain cleaning
- Founded with a mission to be the catalyst for change in municipal governance
